g.text: Heap Sift-Up After Insert: Step-by-Step State Transitions

div.p: Legend: 🔴 Changed element (RED) | ✅ Heap invariant satisfied | 🔄 heap_swap updates BOTH heap_idx AND conn_t→timer_id Cost: log₂(10000) ≈ 13 comparisons max · Sift stops when parent.expiry ≤ child.expiry

g.text: Frame 2: Append New Entry at idx 7 (900ms)

div.p: State: size=7 · root=1000ms ✅ heap invariant holds Array: [1000, 1500, 1200, 2000, 3000, 1800, 2500]
Sift-Up Terminated at pos=0 Final array: [900, 1000, 1200, 1500, 3000, 1800, 2500, 2000] Invariant: parent.expiry ≤ child.expiry ✅
